planets.western_theme: Identity, vitality, will, the core self
planets.vedic_theme: Surya — soul, father, authority, dignity; the karaka of atma (self)

levels.name: Reactive Sun
levels.body_cue: Puffed chest, raised chin, tight throat
levels.behavior: Needs to be seen; collapses when overlooked

levels.name: Productive Sun
levels.body_cue: Upright posture, steady eye contact, full breath
levels.behavior: Takes the stage; signs his name to the work

levels.name: Strategic Sun
levels.body_cue: Centered weight, calm gaze, unhurried speech
levels.behavior: Leads without needing applause; chooses what to bless

levels.name: Mastered Sun
levels.body_cue: Soft eyes, steady breath, hands at rest
levels.behavior: Warms a room by entering it; gives credit and keeps the throne

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Stop performing for the audience that already chose you.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Lead from the body, not the title — let presence do the work.
planets.regression_trigger: Public dismissal, being overlooked, status threat.

planets.vedic_theme: Chandra — mind, mother, comfort, fluctuation; the karaka of manas (mind)

levels.name: Reactive Moon
levels.body_cue: Shallow chest breath, hunched shoulders, watery eyes
levels.behavior: Reads tone as threat; vanishes or clings

levels.name: Productive Moon
levels.body_cue: Open face, relaxed jaw, listening lean
levels.behavior: Notices what the room needs; tends without being asked

levels.name: Strategic Moon
levels.body_cue: Belly breath, soft shoulders, unhurried pace
levels.behavior: Names the feeling without drowning in it

levels.name: Mastered Moon
levels.body_cue: Slow breath cycle, warm gaze, settled hands
levels.behavior: Holds others' weather without taking it on

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Feel the feeling without acting on it for sixty seconds.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Let your nervous system be the room — stop managing, start holding.
planets.regression_trigger: Sleep loss, unmet need for closeness, sudden loneliness.

planets.vedic_theme: Budha — intellect, communication, commerce, wit; the karaka of buddhi (discernment)

levels.name: Reactive Mercury
levels.body_cue: Fast shallow breath, darting eyes, finger-tapping
levels.behavior: Talks over silence; argues to feel safe

levels.name: Productive Mercury
levels.body_cue: Bright eyes, leaning in, hands shaping the air
levels.behavior: Finds the question; makes the complex legible

levels.name: Strategic Mercury
levels.body_cue: Stilled hands, paced breath, deliberate pauses
levels.behavior: Says less, lands harder; cuts the thread that isn't true

levels.name: Mastered Mercury
levels.body_cue: Quiet face, soft gaze, breath between sentences
levels.behavior: Speaks once and the room reorganizes around it

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Pause three seconds before every sentence you wanted to rush.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Stop teaching, start naming. One sentence, no qualifier.
planets.regression_trigger: Feeling unintelligent, being interrupted, information overload.

planets.vedic_theme: Shukra — relationship, refinement, art, partnership; the karaka of kalatra (spouse) and bhoga (enjoyment)

levels.name: Reactive Venus
levels.body_cue: Self-touch checking, posed stillness, scanning gaze
levels.behavior: Performs lovability; resents what she chases

levels.name: Productive Venus
levels.body_cue: Relaxed smile, open hands, easy breath
levels.behavior: Curates a beautiful room; makes others feel chosen

levels.name: Strategic Venus
levels.body_cue: Settled posture, steady eye contact, unhurried touch
levels.behavior: Receives without flinching; refuses without guilt

levels.name: Mastered Venus
levels.body_cue: Soft face, grounded weight, slow open gaze
levels.behavior: Loves on her own terms; her presence is the gift

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Receive a compliment without deflecting or repaying it.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Let what you love change you in public.
planets.regression_trigger: Rejection, comparison wound, scarcity of affection.

planets.vedic_theme: Mangal — courage, blood, brothers, competition; the karaka of energy and bhratru (siblings)

levels.name: Reactive Mars
levels.body_cue: Jaw clenched, heat in face, fists
levels.behavior: Reacts before thinking; treats conversations as fights to win

levels.name: Productive Mars
levels.body_cue: Forward lean, steady breath, focused gaze
levels.behavior: Picks a target and moves; finishes what others stall on

levels.name: Strategic Mars
levels.body_cue: Relaxed shoulders, low slow voice, deliberate pace
levels.behavior: Says no without apology; deploys force only when it changes the outcome

levels.name: Mastered Mars
levels.body_cue: Settled chest, present eyes, hands open
levels.behavior: Steady in crisis; others borrow his nervous system

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Wait one full breath before the punch — verbal or physical.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Use force only for what you love, never for what you fear.
planets.regression_trigger: Disrespect, blocked goal, perceived weakness in self.

planets.vedic_theme: Guru — wisdom, teacher, dharma, children; the karaka of jnana (knowledge) and putra (progeny)

levels.name: Reactive Jupiter
levels.body_cue: Expansive gestures, raised voice, jutting jaw
levels.behavior: Lectures uninvited; promises what he can't carry

levels.name: Productive Jupiter
levels.body_cue: Open chest, warm voice, broad smile
levels.behavior: Lifts the room; opens doors for others

levels.name: Strategic Jupiter
levels.body_cue: Steady posture, paced speech, listening eyes
levels.behavior: Says the hard true thing kindly; invests in long arcs

levels.name: Mastered Jupiter
levels.body_cue: Soft eyes, unhurried breath, hands at rest
levels.behavior: Doesn't preach; people leave him clearer about themselves

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Ask one more question before offering the answer.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Stop teaching the lesson — be the lesson.
planets.regression_trigger: Being doubted, sense of meaninglessness, contraction of horizon.

planets.vedic_theme: Shani — duty, longevity, the working class, justice; the karaka of ayus (lifespan) and karma (work)

levels.name: Reactive Saturn
levels.body_cue: Tight jaw, hunched shoulders, locked knees
levels.behavior: Says no out of dread; mistakes control for safety

levels.name: Productive Saturn
levels.body_cue: Erect spine, steady breath, slow hands
levels.behavior: Shows up daily; does the unglamorous work

levels.name: Strategic Saturn
levels.body_cue: Grounded stance, low slow voice, deliberate pace
levels.behavior: Builds systems that outlast moods; honors the long timeline

levels.name: Mastered Saturn
levels.body_cue: Settled weight, soft serious eyes, unhurried breath
levels.behavior: Holds the line nobody else will hold; ages like good stone

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Set the boundary on Monday so Friday doesn't need one.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Surrender the timeline you can't control without dropping the standard.
planets.regression_trigger: Loss of control, public failure, time pressure on a long project.

planets.western_theme: (North node) — Hunger for the unfamiliar, future-pull, obsession
planets.vedic_theme: Rahu — the eclipse-maker, foreigner, taboo, amplification; the karaka of desire and worldly ambition

levels.name: Reactive Rahu
levels.body_cue: Restless legs, scanning eyes, shallow rapid breath
levels.behavior: Chases the next hit; mistakes intensity for meaning

levels.name: Productive Rahu
levels.body_cue: Forward gaze, alert posture, quickened pulse
levels.behavior: Pursues what others won't; thrives at the frontier

levels.name: Strategic Rahu
levels.body_cue: Steady gaze, paced breath, deliberate reach
levels.behavior: Builds the unconventional career; turns hunger into craft

levels.name: Mastered Rahu
levels.body_cue: Calm in unfamiliar rooms, open hands, settled jaw
levels.behavior: Owns the territory he was once obsessed with; the outsider becomes the standard

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Stay with one obsession for a full year before chasing the next.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Become the thing instead of consuming it.
planets.regression_trigger: Boredom, loss of novelty, fear of having arrived.

planets.vedic_theme: Ketu — the headless one, moksha, intuition, the abandoned skill; the karaka of liberation and isolation

levels.name: Reactive Ketu
levels.body_cue: Glazed eyes, slack posture, breath held high
levels.behavior: Vanishes mid-conversation; calls quitting wisdom

levels.name: Productive Ketu
levels.body_cue: Stilled limbs, soft gaze, slow exhale
levels.behavior: Drops the noise; works alone, finishes deep

levels.name: Strategic Ketu
levels.body_cue: Quiet body, unhurried breath, minimal gesture
levels.behavior: Knows what to abandon; keeps only what burns clean

levels.name: Mastered Ketu
levels.body_cue: Open chest, soft eyes, breath barely visible
levels.behavior: Holds nothing and lacks nothing; leaves no residue

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Renounce on purpose, not by default.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Stay fully here while holding nothing.
planets.regression_trigger: Overwhelm, demand for engagement, threat to solitude.

planets.vedic_theme: (Modern, no classical karaka) — sudden insight, electricity, rupture of pattern

levels.name: Reactive Uranus
levels.body_cue: Twitchy limbs, sharp breath, sudden gestures
levels.behavior: Breaks things to feel free; allergic to all structure

levels.name: Productive Uranus
levels.body_cue: Alert posture, bright eyes, quick clean movement
levels.behavior: Sees the pattern others miss; builds the new instrument

levels.name: Strategic Uranus
levels.body_cue: Steady stance, focused gaze, controlled spark
levels.behavior: Breaks what should break; keeps what should keep

levels.name: Mastered Uranus
levels.body_cue: Settled body, clear eyes, unhurried but alive
levels.behavior: Walks into the room from ten years ahead; rewires without violence

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Keep one structure on purpose to prove freedom isn't chaos.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Disrupt from love, not from itch.
planets.regression_trigger: Forced conformity, slow institutions, loss of autonomy.

planets.vedic_theme: (Modern, no classical karaka) — dream, devotion, mist, the porous self

levels.name: Reactive Neptune
levels.body_cue: Unfocused eyes, slumped frame, sighing breath
levels.behavior: Drifts away from the hard thing; rewrites reality to soothe

levels.name: Productive Neptune
levels.body_cue: Soft gaze, open face, slow breath
levels.behavior: Makes the felt-thing visible; channels something larger

levels.name: Strategic Neptune
levels.body_cue: Grounded stance, steady eyes, paced breath
levels.behavior: Dreams on paper; tests the vision against the world

levels.name: Mastered Neptune
levels.body_cue: Soft body, clear gaze, breath like tide
levels.behavior: Holds the invisible without losing the floor

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Put the dream on a deadline.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Surrender the self without losing the witness.
planets.regression_trigger: Harsh reality check, betrayal of an ideal, exhaustion.

planets.vedic_theme: (Modern, no classical karaka) — buried force, taboo authority, total renewal

levels.name: Reactive Pluto
levels.body_cue: Locked jaw, narrowed eyes, held breath
levels.behavior: Squeezes what he fears losing; punishes through silence

levels.name: Productive Pluto
levels.body_cue: Steady stare, slow deep breath, contained body
levels.behavior: Goes where others won't look; rebuilds from rubble

levels.name: Strategic Pluto
levels.body_cue: Quiet posture, low even voice, unhurried gaze
levels.behavior: Wields power without performing it; transforms instead of dominating

levels.name: Mastered Pluto
levels.body_cue: Settled chest, soft serious eyes, breath like deep water
levels.behavior: Walks people through their own undoing without flinching

planets.growth_edge_2_to_3: Release one grip per week — relationship, story, identity.
planets.growth_edge_3_to_4: Let yourself be transformed by what you transform.
planets.regression_trigger: Loss of control over the unspeakable, exposure of the hidden, deep betrayal.
